name: Xi'an Peri Power Semiconductor Converting Technology Co.,Ltd.
summary: Xi'an Peri Power Semiconductor Converting Technology Co.,Ltd. designs, develops, produces, and services power semiconductor discrete devices, power electronic converters, and power semiconductor device test and other equipment. The company offers power semiconductor devices, such as high-power thyristors and rectifiers, power semiconductor modules, IGBT modules, and heat sinks; and power electronics, including aluminum electrolytic rectifier cabinet, high-power IGBT switching power supply, and DC test station power supply products. It also provides test and non-standard equipment comprising power semiconductor device discrete, comprehensive, conventional, and custom test equipment. The company was founded in 2010 and is based in Xi'an, China. Xi'an Peri Power Semiconductor Converting Technology Co.,Ltd. is a subsidiary of Xi'an Power Electronics Technology Research Institute.
